expectations.evidence: File exists at outputs/game-marketing-context.md and contains a fully structured marketing context document.

expectations.text: Game title is correctly identified as LUTA: Luminoria Tactics (or Luminoria Tactics)
expectations.evidence: Header reads '# Game Marketing Context: LUTA: Luminoria Tactics' and the identity table shows Title: 'LUTA: Luminoria Tactics'.
Identity table row: Developer | HonStudios. Also present in the source URL: com.HonStudios.LuminoriaTactics.

expectations.text: Launch status is set to global launch
expectations.evidence: Header line 'Status: Global Launch' and identity table row: Launch status | 'Global launch (confirmed)'.

expectations.text: Genre reflects tactical/strategy positioning (not casual or hyper-casual)
expectations.evidence: Section 2 states 'Primary genre: Tactical / Strategy (turn-based implied by "Tactics" in title)' with competitive set referencing Fire Emblem Heroes, Tactics Ogre — explicitly mid-core/core positioning.

expectations.text: IAP presence is noted (listing confirms in-app purchases available)
expectations.evidence: Identity table row: In-app purchases | Yes. Section 5 header also states 'Confirmed: In-app purchases present'.

expectations.text: Flags missing data (KPI targets, UA channels, retention actuals) rather than fabricating them
expectations.evidence: Section 9 'Key Data Gaps' table explicitly lists 'Current DAU / MAU / retention' as a gap (MEDIUM priority). Multiple inline GAP callouts appear throughout (e.g., monetization model unconfirmed, rating/reviews unknown). UA channel recommendations are framed as 'once monetization confirmed' rather than stated as actuals. No KPI targets are invented.
